title: 12 Potent Picks Are December's Ideal Dividend Buys
text: A February 2, 2022, Kiplinger Today special report headlined, "Potent Picks to Profit in 2022,” featured 97 dividend-fetching stocks from 118 in that article. Here is YCharts 11/25/22 update. Article titles were: '65 Best Dividends', '15 Value Stocks', '15 Best Mid-Caps', '10 European Plays', '9 High Yields', '6 Sturdy Defensive Stocks.'

title: 8 Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now for a Lifetime of Passive Income
text: Dividend stocks are a great way to protect against a downturn and these are the cream of the crop.

title: 9 Best Value Stocks to Buy Now
text: A roller-coaster year has sent a lot of deserving names into bargain territory. Here are nine value stocks for investors to consider as we head into 2023.

title: Walgreens Named November Aristocrats Top Dog
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of November 8, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar sectors. Broker-estimated top-ten net gains ranged 11.21%-36.63%, topped by MDT & ESS.

title: These 2 Dividend Payers Are Outpacing the S&P 500
text: This pair of steady income stocks is well ahead of the index that finds itself in bear market territory.

title: GPK or AMCR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: GPK vs. AMCR: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Amcor (AMCR) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Lowers FY23 Guidance
text: Amcor's (AMCR) fiscal first-quarter 2023 earnings came in line with the prior--year quarter while revenues improved. The company has lowered adjusted earnings per share guidance to 77 cents to 81 cents.

title: Amcor plc (AMCR) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 1, 2022 5:30 PM ET Company Participants Tracey Whitehead - Head, IR Ron Delia - Managing Director and CEO Michael Casamento - EVP, Finance, and CFO Conference Call Participants Ghansham Panjabi - Baird George Staphos - Bank of America Jakob Cakarnis - Jarden Australia Keith Chau - MST Marquee Kyle White - Deutsche Bank Adam Samuelson - Goldman Sachs Daniel Kang - CLSA Anthony Pettinari - Citi Richard Johnson - Jefferies Mark Wilde - BMO Larry Gandler - Credit Suisse Nathan Reilly - UBS Brook Campbell-Crawford - Barrenjoey John Purtell - Macquarie Operator Good evening. My name is Rob, and I will be our conference operator today.
